expectedIssues: BetRivers Exclusive Games badge shows 0 games
reportedIssues: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays a badge reading '0 Games' even though multiple exclusive game tiles are visibly rendered below the heading.
The third column of game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections is clipped/cut off at the right edge of the screen, making those tiles partially unreadable.
The horizontal navigation filter bar (Home, Tourney, Jackpots, Hot Ga...) has the last visible item 'Hot Ga...' truncated mid-word, with no scroll indicator to suggest more items exist.
The bottom row of 'Top Played New Games' shows game tiles that are cut off vertically at the bottom of the viewport with no visual indicator of how many more games exist.

expected.reasoning: Issue 0 directly describes the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' badge showing '0 Games' despite games being visible below, matching the expected defect exactly.
